dj_text: That was KU IK' SE DET // KALIBER - OFFICIAL VIDEO. Taking it easy with Kaliber "Vest For København". Just two left. The queue is almost spent.
commercial_text: New from the makers of nothing — the SmartFridge X. It texts you when you're out of milk. It also texts your ex.
recovery_text: We're back. That was NOT a crossover event. That was a dimensional bleed.
